kill_chain_report.report_title: Kubernetes Attack Path Kill Chain Report

remediation_actions: Move sensitive data out of db-url-config and restrict read access from api-server.
Remove the endpoint exposure in db-url-config that reveals access to analytics-db, or hide it behind internal-only discovery.
Restrict loadbalancer-svc so it cannot route directly to api-server without an explicit policy check.
Move sensitive data out of db-url-config and restrict read access from api-server.
Remove the endpoint exposure in db-url-config that reveals access to analytics-db, or hide it behind internal-only discovery.
Reduce reachability from internet to loadbalancer-svc with ingress filtering or network policy.
Disable impersonation from cicd-bot to sa-cicd unless it is explicitly required, and scope it to least privilege.
Remove sa-cicd's read access to secret cicd-deploy-token and rotate that secret immediately.
Rotate cicd-deploy-token and replace its direct access into production-db with short-lived credentials or workload identity.
Patch CVE-2024-9999 on log-aggregator and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove direct exec rights from dev-2 into log-aggregator and require audited break-glass access instead.
Remove the RoleBinding that grants node-reader to sa-logger, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

attack_paths.path_display: dev-1 -> web-frontend -> internal-api-svc -> api-server -> db-url-config -> analytics-db
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-1234 on web-frontend and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into web-frontend and require audited break-glass access instead.
Move sensitive data out of db-url-config and restrict read access from api-server.
Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into background-worker and require audited break-glass access instead.
Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
Patch CVE-2023-4567 on sa-worker and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.

Remove the RoleBinding that grants node-reader to sa-logger, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

attack_paths.path_display: loadbalancer-svc -> web-frontend -> sa-webapp -> secret-reader -> db-credentials -> production-db
remediation_actions: Remove the RoleBinding that grants secret-reader to sa-webapp, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

attack_paths.path_display: loadbalancer-svc -> web-frontend -> default -> cluster-admin -> admin-token -> kube-system
remediation_actions: Remove the ClusterRoleBinding that grants cluster-admin to default, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.
Stop web-frontend from falling back to the default service account and bind a dedicated least-privilege account instead.
Remove cluster-admin's read access to secret admin-token and rotate that secret immediately.

Remove direct exec rights from dev-2 into log-aggregator and require audited break-glass access instead.
Remove the RoleBinding that grants node-reader to sa-logger, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

Attack Paths.path_display: internet -> loadbalancer-svc -> api-server -> sa-worker -> pod-exec -> worker-node-1
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
Patch CVE-2023-4567 on sa-worker and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.

Attack Paths.path_display: dev-1 -> background-worker -> sa-worker -> pod-exec -> worker-node-1 -> data-pvc
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into background-worker and require audited break-glass access instead.

Attack Paths.path_display: loadbalancer-svc -> web-frontend -> sa-webapp -> secret-reader -> db-credentials -> production-db
remediation_actions: Remove the RoleBinding that grants secret-reader to sa-webapp, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.
Remove secret-reader's read access to secret db-credentials and rotate that secret immediately.
Rotate db-credentials and replace its direct access into production-db with short-lived credentials or workload identity.

Attack Paths.path_display: internet -> web-frontend -> sa-webapp -> secret-reader -> db-credentials -> production-db
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-1234 on web-frontend and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Reduce reachability from internet to web-frontend with ingress filtering or network policy.
Remove the RoleBinding that grants secret-reader to sa-webapp, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

Attack Paths.path_display: loadbalancer-svc -> api-server -> sa-worker -> pod-exec -> worker-node-1 -> data-pvc
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
Patch CVE-2023-4567 on sa-worker and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.

Attack Paths.path_display: dev-1 -> web-frontend -> sa-webapp -> secret-reader -> db-credentials -> production-db
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-1234 on web-frontend and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into web-frontend and require audited break-glass access instead.
Remove the RoleBinding that grants secret-reader to sa-webapp, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

Attack Paths.path_display: internet -> loadbalancer-svc -> api-server -> sa-worker -> pod-exec -> worker-node-1 -> data-pvc
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
Patch CVE-2023-4567 on sa-worker and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.

Attack Paths.path_display: loadbalancer-svc -> web-frontend -> default -> cluster-admin -> admin-token -> kube-system
remediation_actions: Remove the ClusterRoleBinding that grants cluster-admin to default, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.
Stop web-frontend from falling back to the default service account and bind a dedicated least-privilege account instead.
Remove cluster-admin's read access to secret admin-token and rotate that secret immediately.

Attack Paths.path_display: internet -> web-frontend -> default -> cluster-admin -> admin-token -> kube-system
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-1234 on web-frontend and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Reduce reachability from internet to web-frontend with ingress filtering or network policy.
Remove the ClusterRoleBinding that grants cluster-admin to default, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

Attack Paths.path_display: dev-1 -> web-frontend -> default -> cluster-admin -> admin-token -> kube-system
remediation_actions: Patch CVE-2024-1234 on web-frontend and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into web-frontend and require audited break-glass access instead.
Remove the ClusterRoleBinding that grants cluster-admin to default, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

cycles.remediation: Break cycle: revoke admin-grant from service-b to service-a.

kill_chain_stages.description: The attacker gains entry from an exposed or trusted source.
The compromised workload begins executing with cluster credentials.
The attacker pivots through roles, cluster roles, or secrets to gain stronger access.
The attack traverses the cluster toward its highest-value sink.
The attacker reaches the final sink and can exfiltrate, execute, or disrupt.

kill_chain_report.text_report:
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  KILL CHAIN REPORT  —  2026-04-05 03:11:17
  Cluster : mock-prod-cluster
  Nodes   : 41  |  Edges: 48
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

[ SECTION 1 — ATTACK PATH DETECTION (Dijkstra) ]
  ⚠  18 attack path(s) detected

  Path #1  |  3 hops  |  Risk Score: 9.5  [MEDIUM]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  loadbalancer-svc (Service)  --[routes-to]-->  api-server (Pod)
  api-server (Pod)  --[reads]-->  db-url-config (ConfigMap)
  db-url-config (ConfigMap)  --[exposes-endpoint]-->  analytics-db (Database)
  Remediation:
    - Move sensitive data out of db-url-config and restrict read access from api-server.
    - Remove the endpoint exposure in db-url-config that reveals access to analytics-db, or hide it behind internal-only discovery.
    - Restrict loadbalancer-svc so it cannot route directly to api-server without an explicit policy check.

  Path #2  |  4 hops  |  Risk Score: 11.5  [HIGH]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  internet (ExternalActor)  --[reaches]-->  loadbalancer-svc (Service)
  loadbalancer-svc (Service)  --[routes-to]-->  api-server (Pod)
  api-server (Pod)  --[reads]-->  db-url-config (ConfigMap)
  db-url-config (ConfigMap)  --[exposes-endpoint]-->  analytics-db (Database)
  Remediation:
    - Move sensitive data out of db-url-config and restrict read access from api-server.
    - Remove the endpoint exposure in db-url-config that reveals access to analytics-db, or hide it behind internal-only discovery.
    - Reduce reachability from internet to loadbalancer-svc with ingress filtering or network policy.

  Path #3  |  3 hops  |  Risk Score: 14.0  [HIGH]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cicd-bot (User)  --[impersonates]-->  sa-cicd (ServiceAccount)
  sa-cicd (ServiceAccount)  --[can-read]-->  cicd-deploy-token (Secret)
  cicd-deploy-token (Secret)  --[grants-access-to]-->  production-db (Database)
  Remediation:
    - Disable impersonation from cicd-bot to sa-cicd unless it is explicitly required, and scope it to least privilege.
    - Remove sa-cicd's read access to secret cicd-deploy-token and rotate that secret immediately.
    - Rotate cicd-deploy-token and replace its direct access into production-db with short-lived credentials or workload identity.

  Path #4  |  4 hops  |  Risk Score: 15.0  [HIGH]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  dev-2 (User)  --[can-exec]-->  log-aggregator (Pod)  [CVE-2024-9999, CVSS 6.5]
  log-aggregator (Pod)  --[uses]-->  sa-logger (ServiceAccount)
  sa-logger (ServiceAccount)  --[bound-to]-->  node-reader (Role)
  node-reader (Role)  --[can-read]-->  worker-node-1 (Node)
  Remediation:
    - Patch CVE-2024-9999 on log-aggregator and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
    - Remove direct exec rights from dev-2 into log-aggregator and require audited break-glass access instead.
    - Remove the RoleBinding that grants node-reader to sa-logger, or replace it with the minimum required verbs.

  Path #5  |  5 hops  |  Risk Score: 15.5  [HIGH]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  dev-1 (User)  --[can-exec]-->  web-frontend (Pod)  [CVE-2024-1234, CVSS 8.1]
  web-frontend (Pod)  --[calls]-->  internal-api-svc (Service)
  internal-api-svc (Service)  --[routes-to]-->  api-server (Pod)
  api-server (Pod)  --[reads]-->  db-url-config (ConfigMap)
  db-url-config (ConfigMap)  --[exposes-endpoint]-->  analytics-db (Database)
  Remediation:
    - Patch CVE-2024-1234 on web-frontend and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
    - Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into web-frontend and require audited break-glass access instead.
    - Move sensitive data out of db-url-config and restrict read access from api-server.

  Path #6  |  4 hops  |  Risk Score: 17.0  [HIGH]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  dev-1 (User)  --[can-exec]-->  background-worker (Pod)
  background-worker (Pod)  --[uses]-->  sa-worker (ServiceAccount)
  sa-worker (ServiceAccount)  --[bound-to]-->  pod-exec (Role)
  pod-exec (Role)  --[can-exec-on]-->  worker-node-1 (Node)  [CVE-2024-3116, CVSS 9.0]
  Remediation:
    - Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
    - Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
    - Remove direct exec rights from dev-1 into background-worker and require audited break-glass access instead.

  Path #7  |  4 hops  |  Risk Score: 18.5  [HIGH]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  loadbalancer-svc (Service)  --[routes-to]-->  api-server (Pod)
  api-server (Pod)  --[uses]-->  sa-worker (ServiceAccount)  [CVE-2023-4567, CVSS 7.2]
  sa-worker (ServiceAccount)  --[bound-to]-->  pod-exec (Role)
  pod-exec (Role)  --[can-exec-on]-->  worker-node-1 (Node)  [CVE-2024-3116, CVSS 9.0]
  Remediation:
    - Patch CVE-2024-3116 on worker-node-1 and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.
    - Remove exec-on-node rights from pod-exec to worker-node-1 and gate node access behind privileged approval.
    - Patch CVE-2023-4567 on sa-worker and block that traversal until the fix is deployed.

  node-reader (Role)  --[can-read]-->  worker-node-1 (Node)
